title: Minimum Length of String After Deleting Similar Ends
titleCn: 删除字符串两端相同字符后的最短长度

testcases.input: s = "ca" Output: 2 Explanation: You can't remove any characters, so the string stays as is.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can't remove any characters, so the string stays as is.

testcases.input: s = "cabaabac" Output: 0 Explanation: An optimal sequence of operations is: - Take prefix = "c" and suffix = "c" and remove them, s = "abaaba". - Take prefix = "a" and suffix = "a" and remove them, s = "baab". - Take prefix = "b" and suffix = "b" and remove them, s = "aa". - Take prefix = "a" and suffix = "a" and remove them, s = "".
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: An optimal sequence of operations is: - Take prefix = "c" and suffix = "c" and remove them, s = "abaaba". - Take prefix = "a" and suffix = "a" and remove them, s = "baab". - Take prefix = "b" and suffix = "b" and remove them, s = "aa". - Take prefix = "a" and suffix = "a" and remove them, s = "".

testcases.input: s = "aabccabba" Output: 3 Explanation: An optimal sequence of operations is: - Take prefix = "aa" and suffix = "a" and remove them, s = "bccabb". - Take prefix = "b" and suffix = "bb" and remove them, s = "cca".
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: An optimal sequence of operations is: - Take prefix = "aa" and suffix = "a" and remove them, s = "bccabb". - Take prefix = "b" and suffix = "bb" and remove them, s = "cca".
